root_text.an10.155:1.1: “Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo na sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.155:1.3: Micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, micchāsaṅkappo hoti, micchāvāco hoti, micchākammanto hoti, micchāājīvo hoti, micchāvāyāmo hoti, micchāsati hoti, micchāsamādhi hoti, micchāñāṇī hoti, micchāvimutti hoti—
root_text.an10.155:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo na sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.155:2.1: Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.155:2.3: Sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, sammāsaṅkappo hoti, sammāvāco hoti, sammākammanto hoti, sammāājīvo hoti, sammāvāyāmo hoti, sammāsati hoti, sammāsamādhi hoti, sammāñāṇī hoti, sammāvimutti hoti—
root_text.an10.155:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo sevitabbo”ti.

translation_text.an10.155:1.1: “Mendicants, you should not associate with an individual who has ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.155:1.3: Wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom.
translation_text.an10.155:1.4: You should not associate with an individual who has these ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.155:2.1: You should associate with an individual who has ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.155:2.3: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.155:2.4: You should associate with an individual who has these ten qualities.”
